Cloves, लौंग 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2-3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 inch Ginger, peeled & sliced, अदरक 4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 2-3 no. Green chillies, हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने few Tender Coriander stem, धनिया के डंठल For Mutton Marination 1 kg Mutton, with bones, मटन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी काली मिर्च For Mutton Curry 2-4 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 no. Dry red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग Marinated Mutton, मैरिनेटेड मटन Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Pressure Cooking Mutton 1 ½ cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Cooked Mutton, पका हुआ मटन 1 tbsp Prepared Sunday Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Sunday Masala 1 ½ tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 5-6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2-4 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग 2 no. Mace, जावित्री 1 tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Paste In a bowl, add onions, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, cloves, black cardamom, green cardamom, cinnamon stick, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, salt to taste, ginger, garlic, green chili, oil, black peppercorns and coriander stems. Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind into a smooth fine paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Marination In a bowl, add mutton, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, black peppercorns and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Mutton Curry In a handi, heat oil, add dry red chilies, cloves and let it splutter. Add marinated mutton and saute it for 5-6 minutes on medium flame. Add prepared paste and saute it for a few minutes. add mustard oil, curd and simmer it for a while until cooked well. Add coriander leaves and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking In Cooker In a pressure cooker, add water, salt to taste and get a quick boil. Add cooked mutton and cover it with a lid and cook it for 2-3 whistles on high flame. Add prepared masala and simmer for 4-5 minutes, add coriander leaves and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. For Masala In a plate, add black peppercorns, black cardamom, green cardamom, cloves, mace, dry fenugreek leaves, salt to taste and dry roast it for a minute. Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind into smooth fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Green chilies (less spicy & diced) हरी मिर्च 2 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 medium semi-ripe Mango (peeled & julienned) कैरी 2 medium Tomato, sliced, टमाटर Fried bhindi, तली हुई भिंडी ¼ cup Spring onion, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्त For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता semi-ripe Mango, sliced, कैरी For Curd Mixture ¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हिंग 2 tsp Gram flour, बेसन ¼ cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp semi-ripe Mango pulp, कच्चे आम का गूदा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Dahi Bhindi 2 tsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, बारीक राई 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ता ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हिंग ½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 1 Green chili (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च Prepared Curd Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही मिश्रन 15-20 no. Fried Lady fingers, तले हुए भिंडी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Chili oil, मिर्च का तेल Process For Marination In a bowl, add clean lady fingers, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, oil and toss it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Frying In a deep shallow pan, add mustard oil, oil once it's hot, add the marinated lady fingers and shallow fry it for a minute on low flame or until par cooked. Transfer it to a tray and keep aside for further use. For Tempeing In a kadai, add remaining excess oil, oil, mustard oil, once it’s hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds and let it splutter. Add asafoetida, ginger, green chili, onion, ginger garlic paste, curd and mix it well. Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and saute it for 2-4 minutes. Add salt to taste, sugar, semi-ripe mango, tomatoes and toss it well. Add fried lady fingers and give a good toss. Add spring onion and let it cook on medium flame for a few minutes. Finish it with coriander leaves and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with coriander sprig and slice mango. Serve hot with roti. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add curd, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, and a pinch of asafoetida, gram flour, water, semi-ripe mango pulp, salt to taste and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. For Dahi Bhindi In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, and small mustard seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter. Add asafoetida, ginger, green chili, prepared curd mixture and cook on medium flame for a while. Add fried lady fingers and toss it well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig, chili oil. Serve hot with roti *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #bhindidopyazarecipe #bhindimasala #ranveerbrar #bhindirecipe #bhindifry #bhindikisabjirecipe #dhabastyle

http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** CHICKEN CHOPSUEY Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Boiling Noodles 1 ltr Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 packs Noodles, नूडल्स 2 tbsp Oil, तेल For Sauce 2-3 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टाॅमेटो केचप 2 tbsp Red chilli sauce, रेड चिली सॉस 1 ½ tbsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस 1 tbsp Green chilli sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 cup Water, पानी For Frying Oil for Frying, तेल तलने के लिए 100 gms Chicken breast, (thinly slice season with salt) चिकन Boiled Noodles, उबले हुए नूडल्स For Gravy 2 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 5-6 no.Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 1 medium Onion, sliced, प्याज 1 medium Carrot, julienned, गाजर 3-4 no.Baby corn, cut into diagonally, बेबी कॉर्न 1 medium Red bell pepper, julienned, रेड बेल पेपर 1 medium Yellow bell pepper, julienned,यलो बेल पेपर 1 medium Capsicum, julienned, शिमला मिर्च ½ cup Cabbage, shredded, पत्ता गोभी 1 tsp Dark soy sauce (optional) सोया सॉस Fried Chicken, तला हुआ चिकन Prepared Sauce mixture, तैयार किये हुए सॉस का मिश्रण 1 cup Water, पानी 4-5 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्न स्टार्च का लिजाम 1 no. Green chillies, less spicy, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता few Spring onion, प्याज पत्ता For Fried Egg 1 tsp Oil, तेल 1 whole Egg, अंडा For Assembling Fried Noodles, फ्राइड नूडल्स Prepared Chicken Gravy, तैयार की हुई चिकन ग्रेवी Spring onion, chopped, प्याज पत्ता Fried Egg, तला हुआ अंडा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Process For Sauce Mixture In a bowl, add tomato ketchup, red chili sauce, light soy sauce, green chili sauce, sugar, water and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Boiling Noodles In a big sauce pot, add water, salt to taste and get it to roaring boiled on high flame. Add noodles and boil it for 6-7 minutes or until cooked on medium to high flame. Strain the noodles, add oil and toss it well with the help of a fork or hands. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Frying Noodles In a wok, heat oil, add boiled noodles and fry it until golden brown in color. Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Frying Chicken In the same wok, add chicken strips and fry until par cooked. Transfer it on a plate and keep it aside for further use. For Chopsuey In the same wok, heat oil, add ginger garlic, onions and sweat it for a minute on high flame. Add carrots, babycorn and saute on high flame for a minute. Add green bell pepper, red bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, cabbage, dark soy sauce and mix it well. Add fried chicken and toss well, add prepared sauce mixture, water and give it a quick boil. Add cornstarch slurry and cook it for a minute until the gravy thickens. Finish it with green chili, spring onion, coriander leaves and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Egg In an omelet pan, heat oil, add egg and cook it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling On a serving dish, place fried noodles, prepared chicken chop suey, spring onion, fried egg and sprinkle some salt to taste. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Chickenchopsuey #chopsueyrecipe #ranveerbrar #americanchopsuey #bibimbap #koreanchickennoodles #koreanstreetfood #friedegg

Garlic cloves, लहसुन 2 no. Green chillies, less spicy, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Chicken Marination Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 900 gram Chicken (Drumstick & thigh with bones) चिकन 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, दगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 ½ tsp Ghee, घी For Soaking Fenugreek leaves ½ tbsp Dry fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी 2-3 tbsp Water, पानी For Chicken Patiala 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 5-6 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2-4 no. Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 2-3 medium Onions, chopped, प्याज Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन Soaked fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी 1 medium Tomato, chopped, टमाटर ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stem, chopped, धनिया के डंठल ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, दगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 cups Curd, beaten, दही 2-3 tbsp Fresh cream, ताजा क्रीम ½ tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता For Chicken patiala Pulao ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp Caraway seeds, शाही जीरा 1 Green chili (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, peeled & roughly chopped, अदरक 1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज Cooked Chicken Patiala, तैयार किया हुआ चिकन पटियाला ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped Cooked sella basmati rice, पका हुआ चावल Prepared Tempering, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का For Tempering 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 medium Tomato, chopped ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped ½ tsp Degi red chili powder For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process Make a rough ginger garlic paste For Marination In a bowl, add prepared ginger garlic paste, chicken, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, oil and mix it well. Keep it aside for 15-20 minutes to marinate. For Soaking Fenugreek Leaves In a bowl, add dry fenugreek leaves, water and stir it well. Keep it aside for soaking. For Chicken Patiala In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add black peppercorns, cloves, green cardamom, bay leaf, cinnamon stick and let it splutter. Add onion and saute it for 5-6 minutes until golden in color on moderate heat. Add marinated chicken and saute for 2-3 minutes. Add fenugreek leaves and cook it for a minute. Add tomato, coriander stems, coriander powder, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Add water, salt to taste and simmer it for a while. Add curd and cook it for 7-8 minutes on moderate heat. Add fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. For Chicken patiala Pulao In a wok or pan, add oil, once it's hot, add caraway seeds and let it splutter well. Add onions, ginger, green chili and saute it for a minute or until translucent on high flame. Add cooked chicken patiala, coriander leaves, cooked sella basmati rice, prepared tadka, cover it with the lid and cook it for 3-4 minutes on low flame. Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with raita. For Tempering In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add tomato, coriander leaves, degi red chili powder and saute it on high flame. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickenpatiala #chickencurry #ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe #chickenbhunarecipe #spicychicken #murgpatiala #tandoorichicken #chickenmasala

raw_text: AFGHANI MALAI KOFTA - If you thought you have tried the same old Kofta and need something new, then try this one! *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Lauki Kofta - https://youtu.be/487VfUaTUdc Mutton Kofta - https://youtu.be/ml5onhmg1G0 *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** AFGHANI MALAI KOFTA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Mawa Kofta 100 gms Mawa, मावा 200 gms Paneer, पनीर 1 medium Potato (boiled & grated) आलू A pinch of green cardamom powder, हरी इलायची का पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक 1 no. Garlic cloves, grated, लहसुन ¼ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी काली मिर्च 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 5-6 no. Raisins, chopped, किशमिश 2-4 no. Almond, chopped, बादाम 2 tbsp Refined flour, मैदा 1 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च For Paste ¼ cup fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता 1 cup fresh Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता 9-10 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू 2 no. Green chillies, less spicy, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 no. Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 no. Black cardamom seeds, बड़ी इलायची के दाने 1-2 no. Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 2 medium Onion, cut into half, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही For Gravy 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 1 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता ½ tsp Caraway seeds, शाही जीरा Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट 1 cup Water, पानी 1 no. Green chili, slit into half, हरी मिर्च For Stuffing 1 no. Apricot, chopped, खुबानी 1 no. Almonds, बादाम 2 no. Fox nut, मखाने Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए Refined flour, for dusting, मैदा For Garnish Chili oil, मिर्च का तेल Fresh cream, ताजा क्रीम Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी काली मिर्च Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Mawa Kofta In a parat, add mawa, paneer and mix it well until mushy with the help of hands. Add boiled potato, green cardamom powder, salt to taste, ginger, garlic, black peppercorn, coriander leaves, green chillies, raisins, almonds and knead it in a soft dough. Keep it aside to rest for 5-10 minutes. Take the mixture, stuff it with apricot and make lemon balls or give any desired shape. Dust it with refined flour and cornstarch. In a kadai, heat oil, drop the kofta and fry until golden brown in color on medium flame. Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use. For Paste In a bowl, add fresh mint leaves, coriander leaves, cashew nuts, green chillies, oil, coriander powder, turmeric powder, cloves, black cardamom seeds, curd, onion and mix it together. Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. Add curd and mix it well. keep it aside for further use. For Gravy In a kadai or a sauce pot, add oil, once it’s hot, add cinnamon stick, bay leaf, caraway seeds and let it splutter. Add prepared paste and saute it for 7-8 minutes or until cooked well. Add water, let it cook for a minute and finish the gravy with green chillies. Transfer it to a serving dish and place fried koftas. Garnish it with chili oil, fresh cream, crushed black peppercorn and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #malaikoftarecipe #Afghanimalaikofta #ranveerbrar #malaikoftarecipeinhindi #paneerkoftarecipe #malaikoftacurry #mawamalaikofta #koftakaisebanatehain #nargisikoftay #hoteljaisemalaikofta

Green chiles (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च 2 no. medium Onions, sliced, प्याज 5-6 Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 2 Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 10-12 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3-4 Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 kg Mutton with bones, मटन 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, roughly chopped, धनिया के डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, दगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी काली मिर्च 1 ½ cup Hot water, गर्म पानी 2 tsp Ghee, घी For Dry Masala 2 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 4 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची For Ginger Garlic Paste 7-8 no.Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger, peeled & roughly chopped, अदरक 2-3 no. Green chilies (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च For Mutton Tawa Fry 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 2 ½ medium Onions, sliced, प्याज 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ता ¼ cup Water, पानी Prepared Ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 3 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी काली मिर्च Cooked Mutton, पका हुआ मटन 1 tbsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ता For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Cooking Mutton In a pressure cooker, add oil, once it's hot, add green chili, onions, garlic, ginger and saute them for 2-3 minutes or until translucent. Add bay leaf, black peppercorns, cloves, mutton, tender coriander stems, salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and mix it well. Add hot water, ghee, cover it with the lid and cook it for 5-6 whistles or until cooked well.. For Dry Masala In a bowl, add black peppercorns, black cardamom and green cardamom. Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add garlic, ginger, green chili and make a coarse paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Mutton Tawa Fry In a shallow cast iron pan or tawa, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, onions, curry leaves and saute until golden brown. Add water, ginger garlic paste and saute it for a minute. Add curd, coriander powder, black peppercorns and saute until it thickens. Add cooked mutton and let it simmer for a while. Add prepared masala, curry leaves and mix it well. Transfer to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. raw_text: PEANUT BUTTER & SMOOTHIE - On super audience demand, here's a break down of Peanut butter, the types you can make and recipes you can try with it too :) *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Mango Shake & Smoothie - https://youtu.be/zcNmQX1KFVs Jumbo Sandwich - https://youtu.be/KdLvelT0R1A Paneer at Home - https://youtu.be/zn1Nvb2lbcg *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PEANUT BUTTER PAAKSHALA Preparation time 20-25 minutes Cooking time 10-15 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Roasting 600 grms Peanuts, मूंगफली For Base Peanut Butter 600 grms Roasted peanuts, deskin, भुनी हुई मूंगफली 2 tbsp Coconut oil, cold pressed, नारियल का तेल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Honey, शहद 2-3 tbsp Peanut oil/ Salad oil, cold pressed, मूंगफली का तेल For Chocolate Peanut Butter 1 cup Prepared base Peanut Butter, पीनट बटर 100 gms Dark chocolate, chopped, डार्क चॉकलेट 2 tbsp Peanut oil/ Salad oil, cold pressed, मूंगफली का तेल For Regular/ Smooth Peanut Butter 1 cup Prepared base Peanut Butter, पीनट बटर 2 tbsp Peanut oil/ Salad oil, cold pressed, मूंगफली का तेल 2-3 tbsp Honey, शहद 2 tbsp Peanut oil/ Salad oil, cold pressed, मूंगफली का तेल For Chunky Peanut Butter 1 cup Prepared base Peanut Butter, पीनट बटर 2 tbsp Peanut oil/ Salad oil, cold pressed, मूंगफली का तेल 2-3 tbsp Honey, शहद ¼ cup Roasted peanut, भुनी हुई मूंगफली For Peanut Butter Smoothie 2 no. Banana, केला 1 heaped tbsp Chocolate Peanut Butter, चॉकलेट पीनट बटर 2 cups Milk, दूध few Ice cubes, बर्फ़ ½ tbsp Honey, शहद For Peanut Butter Toast 3-4 no. Bread slice, ब्रेड ½ tbsp Chocolate Peanut Butter, चॉकलेट पीनट बटर ½ tbsp Smooth Peanut Butter, पीनट बटर 1 no. banana, sliced, केला 1 tsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Ganish Chocolate chips, चॉकलेट चिप्स Banana, sliced, केला Process For Roasting In a pan, add peanuts and dry roast it for a few minutes or until light golden on medium flames. Transfer it to a tray and deskin it by rubbing with the help of hands or with the cloth. Keep it aside for further use. For Base Peanut Butter In a grinder jar, add roasted peanuts and grind it into coarse powder. Add coconut oil, salt to taste and grind it until smooth. Add honey, peanut oil and grind it well for a minute. Transfer it to a bowl and keep aside for further use. Store it in a cleaned and airtight container. For Chocolate Peanut Butter In a grinder jar, add prepared base peanut butter, dark chocolate, peanut oil and grind it well. Transfer it to a bowl and keep aside for further use. Store it in a cleaned and airtight container. For Regular / Smooth Peanut Butter In a grinder jar, add prepared base peanut butter, peanut oil, honey and grind into a smooth paste. Add peanut oil and grind it well for a minute. Transfer it to a bowl and keep aside for further use. Store it in a cleaned and airtight container. For Chunky Peanut Butter In a grinder jar, add prepared base peanut butter, peanut oil, honey and grind it to a smooth paste. Add roasted peanuts and grind it for a few seconds. Transfer it to a bowl and keep aside for further use. Store it in a cleaned and airtight container. For Peanut Butter Smoothie In a grinder jar, add banana, chocolate peanut butter, milk, a few ice cubes, honey and grind it into a thick shake. Transfer it to a serving glass, garnish it with chocolate chips and banana slices. Serve chill. For Peanut Butter Toast Spread smooth peanut butter on one bread slice and chocolate peanut butter on another bread slice. Add banana and make a sandwich. In a pan add butter, place the toast and toast it from both the sides. Cut it into a half and transfer it to a serving dish. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #peanutbutter #peanutbutterjelly #ranveerbrar #peanutbutterrecipe #peanutbutterandjelly #peanutbuttercookies #peanutbutterrecipes #peanutbuttersmoothie #peanutbuttersandwich

ingredients: 5-6 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च | 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल | 400 grm Mutton bones, मटन की हड्डियाँ | 1 kg Mutton mince, मटन खीमा | Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, दगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stem, roughly chopped, धनिया के डंठल | 4 medium Onion, sliced, प्याज | Warm water as required, गुनगुना पानी | 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही | 1 cup Water, पानी | 3-4 medium Potatoes (peeled & cubed) आलू | 4-5 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची | 6 no. Cloves, लौंग | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | Prepared Chutney, तैयार की हुई चटनी
instructions: For Ginger Garlic Paste | In a mortar pestle, add garlic, ginger, green chili and make a coarse paste. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Aloo Keema | In a lagan or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add mutton bones and saute it on high flame for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown in color. | Add mutton mince, prepared ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, tender coriander stems, onions and mix it well. | Cover it with a lid and add water on the top, cook it for 10-15 minutes on moderate heat or until partially cooked. | Add water, curd and mix it well. | Cover it with a lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes on moderate heat. | Add water, potatoes and cover it with the lid, simmer it for a while on moderate heat. | Add coriander leaves, green chili, prepared masala and mix it well | Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. | Serve hot with roti or chapati and prepared chutney. | On a gas range, place a cooking rack, tomato, green chili and roast them well. | In a bowl, add roasted tomato, green chili, dry pomegranate seeds, salt to taste, sugar, oil, mint leaves, ginger, coriander leaves and transfer it into a mixer grinder jar. | Grind it into a smooth paste and Keep it aside for further use. | In a pan, add cumin seeds, black peppercorns, black cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick, salt to taste and dry roast it on moderate heat. | Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind into fine powder. | Keep it aside for further use | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: ALOO MUTTON KEEMA MASALA - I am back with another weekend special :) This Aloo Keema or Aloo Mutton Kheema is absolutely divine with chapati or rice alike!! *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Keema Masala - https://youtu.be/PtY04QBYlDg Cooker mein Mutton Pulao - https://youtu.be/iQB1vTgrUoA Mutton Chop Masala - https://youtu.be/9ygscSWlh_4 *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** ALOO KEEMA MASALA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Ginger Garlic Paste 5-6 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन ½ inch Ginger, peeled, अदरक 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च For Aloo Keema 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 400 grm Mutton bones, मटन की हड्डियाँ 1 kg Mutton mince, मटन खीमा Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, दगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stem, roughly chopped, धनिया के डंठल 4 medium Onion, sliced, प्याज Warm water as required, गुनगुना पानी 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 cup Water, पानी 3-4 medium Potatoes (peeled & cubed) आलू 4-5 no. Green chilies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Chutney ​​ 1 medium Tomato, roasted, टमाटर 2 Green chillies, roasted, हरी मिर्च 1 heaped tbsp Dry pomegranate seeds, सूखे अनारदाना Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tsp Oil, तेल few Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक ⅓ cup Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता For Masala 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 12-15 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 6 no. Cloves, लौंग ¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Onion roundels, प्याज Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Prepared Chutney, तैयार की हुई चटनी Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Process For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add garlic, ginger, green chili and make a coarse paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Aloo Keema In a lagan or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add mutton bones and saute it on high flame for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown in color. Add mutton mince, prepared ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, tender coriander stems, onions and mix it well. Cover it with a lid and add water on the top, cook it for 10-15 minutes on moderate heat or until partially cooked. Add water, curd and mix it well. Cover it with a lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes on moderate heat. Add water, potatoes and cover it with the lid, simmer it for a while on moderate heat. Add coriander leaves, green chili, prepared masala and mix it well Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or chapati and prepared chutney. For Chutney On a gas range, place a cooking rack, tomato, green chili and roast them well. In a bowl, add roasted tomato, green chili, dry pomegranate seeds, salt to taste, sugar, oil, mint leaves, ginger, coriander leaves and transfer it into a mixer grinder jar. Grind it into a smooth paste and Keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a pan, add cumin seeds, black peppercorns, black cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick, salt to taste and dry roast it on moderate heat. Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind into fine powder. Keep it aside for further use *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #alookeemamasala #muttonkeemamasala #ranveerbrar #aloomuttoncurry #muttonrecipe #muttoncurry #muttonbiryani #muttonkuruma #muttonkulamburecipe

Cloves 1 ½ tsp Black peppercorns 3 no. Green cardamom 2 no. Black cardamom, ½ inch Cinnamon stick 2-4 no. Fenugreek seeds 2-3 Bay leaf Salt to taste For Dry Masala 4-5 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 10-12 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 4-5 Cloves, लौंग 1-2 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया की बीज 1 ½ tsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने ¼ tsp Mustard seeds, सरसों के बीज 3-4 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 2-3 Dry red chili es (broken into half) सूखी लाल मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Roasting Poha 2-3 cups Poha For Gravy 1 ½ tbsp Oil 2 medium Onion, sliced 250 gms Chicken bones 1 ½ tbsp Prepared Paste 3-4 cups Water ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped For Cooking Chicken 1 ½ tbsp Oil 2-3 medium Onion, sliced Roasted Chicken & potato ⅓ cup Prepared Paste Little Water 1 tsp Coriander leaves, chopped 1 ½ tsp Prepared Masala ½ cup Roasted Poha For Dhungar Coal 1-2 tsp Ghee For Salad 1 Onion, sliced 1 Lemon, cut into wedges 2-3 Green chili (spicy) For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Marination In a bowl, add potatoes, chicken, salt to taste, oil, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, degi red chili powder, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and mix it well. Keep it aside to marinate for 15-20 minutes. For Paste In a bowl, add green chilies, ginger, garlic cloves, coriander leaves with stem, dry coconut, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, asafoetida, cloves, black peppercorns, green cardamom, black cardamom, cinnamon stick, fenugreek seeds, salt to taste and transfer it to a grinder jar. Grind into fine smooth paste and keep it aside for further use. For Dry Masala In a pan, add black cardamom, green cardamom, cumin seeds, cloves, coriander seeds, black peppercorns, mustard seeds, bay leaf, cinnamon stick, dry red chilies, salt to taste and dry roast it on low flame. Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind it to a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Roasting Poha In a pan, add poha and dry roast it for 5-6 minutes on medium flame until crispy in texture. Transfer it into a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Roasting Chicken In a skewer, prick the marinated chicken, potatoes and repeat the process. Roast it on the medium flame until the chicken is 60-70% cooked. Keep it aside for further use. For Gravy In a handi or sauce pot, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute it for a minute. Add chicken bones and saute for a while on moderate heat until golden brown. Add prepared paste and saute it well, add water and simmer it for a while. Add coriander leaves and Turn off the flame. Transfer into the serving bowl and serve hot. For Cooking Chicken In a handi or sauce pot, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute until golden in color. Add roasted chicken & potato, prepared paste and cook it for 5-6 minutes. Add a little water and cook it well. Place a steel bowl in the sauce pot, add burnt coal, drizzle ghee for dhungar and cover it with the lid. Remove the bowl, add coriander leaves, prepared masala, roasted poha and mix it well. Transfer it to the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. For Salad In a serving bowl, add onions, lemon wedges and green chili. Serve it with the dish. ******************************************** #chickenrecipe #chickenbhunarecipe #ranveerbrar #pohachicken #virarfamouschickenbhujing #chickenlegpiece

Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 3-4 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग For Ginger Garlic Paste 8-10 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक 2 no. Green chillies, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Anda Tawa Masala 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 3 medium Onions, chopped, प्याज 1 medium Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 1 tsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल 1 heaped tbsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी Little water, पानी 1 tsp Oil, तेल 6-7 no. Hard boiled eggs, cut into half, उबले हुए अंडे 1 tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 Green chili (less spicy & sliced) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Coriander leaves with stem, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 small Tomato, sliced, टमाटर Little water, पानी 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Tomato, sliced, टमाटर For Anda Pulav Remaining Anda Tawa Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अंडा तवा मसाला 2 cups Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल 1 ½ tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 Green chili, roughly chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 small Tomato, cubed, टमाटर 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 heaped tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish fresh Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ती Process For Tawa Masala In a shallow pan, add black peppercorns, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, green cardamom, black cardamom, fennel seeds, bay leaf, cinnamon stick, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, asafoetida and dry roast it for a minute on medium flame. Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind into a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add garlic cloves, ginger, green chili, salt to taste and make a coarse paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Anda Tawa Masala In a flat deep tawa or shallow pan, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add prepared ginger garlic paste, cumin seeds and saute it for a minute. Add onions and saute it until translucent. Add tomato, coriander stems and cook it well on moderate heat. Add prepared masala and saute it well. Add tomato puree, little water and let it cook well. Transfer the masala side onto the tawa edges, add oil, place boiled eggs, sprinkle some prepared masala and shallow fry them until golden. Add green chili, coriander leaves stems, tomato, little water and mix it altogether. Finish the tawa masala with some butter. Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl, garnish it with coriander sprig and tomato sliced. Serve hot with ladi pav or roti. For Anda Pulav In the same tawa, add cooked rice and mix well. Sprinkle prepared masala, add green chili, tomato, coriander leaves, butter, salt to taste, lemon juice and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving plate or bowl, garnish it with coriander sprig and mint sprig. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #andatawamasala #tawapulav #ranveerbrar #andapulao #Andapulavmasala #andacurry #andamasala #tawamasala #pavbhaji #streetfood

Dated, seedless, खजूर 1 Banana, peeled, केला ¼ cup Prepared Coffee Syrup, कॉफी सिरप 1 tsp Instant coffee powder, कॉफी पाउडर 1 ¼ cup Milk, दूध 3-4 Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े For Serving (Coffee Smoothie) Prepared coffee smoothie, तैयार की हुई कॉफी स्मूदी ½ tsp Instant coffee powder, कॉफी पाउडर 1-2 tsp Prepared Coffee Syrup, कॉफी सिरप For Caramel Mocha/ Frappuccino 1 tbsp Caramel Syrup,कैरामेल सिरप ¼ cup Prepared Coffee Syrup, कॉफी सिरप ⅓ cup Chocolate, cubed, चॉकलेट ¼ cup Milk, दूध 9-10 Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े For Serving (Caramel Mocha/ Frappuccino) Prepared Caramel Mocha, तैयार कि हुई कैरामेल मोका 1 tsp Caramel syrup, कैरामेल सिरप Chocolate, grated, चॉकलेट Chocochips, चोको चिप्स ¼ tsp Instant coffee powder, कॉफी पाउडर 1 tsp Caramel syrup, कैरामेल सिरप Process For Coffee Decoction In a sauce pot, add castor sugar, coffee powder, water and boil it for a while until brewed. Transfer it into a bowl and let it cool down at room temperature or store it in a refrigerator for further use. For Caramel Syrup In a saucepot, add sugar, little water and let it cook on high flame until golden in color. Add condensed milk and cook it well until thick. Add butter and mix, add water to adjust the consistency and let it cook for 5-6 minutes. Strain and transfer it into a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Regular Cold Coffee In a plastic container or glass jar, add ice cubes, milk and prepared coffee syrup. Cover it with a lid and shake it well until frothy. In a serving glass, add prepared coffee syrup, pour prepared cold coffee and top it up with ice cubes. Serve chilled. For Caramel Cold Coffee In a plastic container, add milk, prepared caramel syrup, prepared coffee syrup, ice cubes and coffee powder. Cover it with a lid and shake it well until frothy. In a serving glass, add prepared caramel syrup, ice cubes, prepared caramel coffee and garnish it with prepared caramel syrup. Serve chilled. For Nitro Cold Coffee In a serving glass, add prepared coffee syrup, chilled soda and mix it well. Add milk, ice cubes and serve chilled. For Coffee Smoothie In a mixer grinder jar, add dates, banana, prepared coffee syrup, instant coffee powder, milk, ice cubes and grind into a thick shake. In a serving glass, pour prepared coffee smoothie, sprinkle coffee powder, pour some prepared coffee syrup and Serve chilled. For Caramel Mocha/ Frapuccino In a mixer grinder jar, add prepared caramel syrup, prepared coffee syrup, chocolate, milk, ice cubes and churn it until smooth consistency. In a serving glass, add prepared caramel mocha, pour some caramel syrup, garnish it with chocolate, choco chip, sprinkle instant coffee powder and caramel syrup. Serve chilled. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #coldcoffee #Nitrocoldbrew #ranveerbrar #Icedcoffee #frappucino #caramelmacchiato

Kashmiri dry red chilies, कश्मीरी सूखी लाल मिर्च 3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 tsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 Mace, जावित्री 1 tsp Caraway seeds, शाही जीरा ½ tsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Shammi Mixture 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 medium size Onions, sliced, प्याज 1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक Marinated Mutton, मैरिनेटेड मटन ¼ cup Water, पानी ¼ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Chutney ⅓ cup Walnuts ½ tsp Ghee, घी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Flax seeds, अलसी के बीज 1-2 no. Green chilies, less spicy, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, grated, अदरक few Mint leaves, chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी ¼ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही For Stuffing 1 large Onion, finely chopped, प्याज 2-3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & spicy) chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Mint leaves, chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, नमक स्वादअनुसार Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Shikampuri kebab Prepared Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ शमी मिश्रण Prepared Stuffing, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रण Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Shammi kebab Prepared Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ शमी मिश्रण Prepared Stuffing, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रण 1 Egg, beaten, अंडा Oil for shallow frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Onion roundels, लच्छा प्याज Lemon wedges, नींबू फांक A pinch degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Process For Marination In a bowl, add mutton, chana dal, curd, ghee, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, kashmiri dry red chili, black cardamom, black peppercorns, mace, caraway seeds, coriander seeds, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Shammi Mixture In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add onion and saute until Translucent. Add ginger, marinated mutton, water and cook it for 7-8 whistles or until cooked well. Transfer it to a parat and let it cool down, separate the bones and flesh. Grind it to a smooth mixture, add black pepper powder, salt to taste and keep it aside for further use. For Chutney In a pan, add walnut, ghee, flax seeds and toast it for a minute. Transfer it to a bowl, add green chillies, ginger, mint leaves, coriander stems, salt to taste, sugar, black pepper powder, curd and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Stuffing In a bowl, add onion, green chilies, mint and mix it together. Keep it aside for further use. For Shikampuri kebab Take the prepared mixture, stuff the filling and make lemon size balls. Give it a desired shape. In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place the kebab and shallow fry until golden brown in color. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig, lemon wedges. Serve hot with chutney. For Shammi kebab Take the prepared mixture, add prepared stuffing and mix it well. Make lemon size balls and give it a desired shape. In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place the kebab and shallow fry until golden brown in color. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig, lemon wedges. Serve hot with chutney. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #shamikabab #muttonrecipe #ranveerbrar #muttonkebab #muttonkofta #muttonballs #galoutikebab

Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 tsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ 2 medium Potatoes (boiled & grated) आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Dip ½ cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ 1 tsp Oregano, ओरिगैनो 1 tsp Chili flakes, चिली फलैक्स ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 no. Garlic clove, grated, लहसुन 1 ½ tbsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप For Salad 1 medium Tomato, sliced, टमाटर 1 medium Onion, sliced, प्याज ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ tsp Black peppercorn, crushed, काली मिर्च के दाने For Bread Crumbs 8-10 no. Bread slices, trimmed, ब्रेड स्लाइस Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Refined flour, मैदा Other Ingredient Oil, for frying, तेल Prepared Bread crumbs (for coating) तैयार किया हुआ ब्रेड क्रम्ब्स For Tossing 1 tsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy, chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Prepared Nuggets, तैयार किया हुआ नगेट्स 3-4 no. Ladi pav, लादी पाव For Burger Assembling Tossed ladi pav, लादी पाव Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद Mint chutney, पुदीने की चटनी Tossed Nuggets, तैयार किया हुआ नगेट्स Prepared Dip, तैयार किया हुआ डिप Processed Cheese, grated, चीज़ For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Chicken Nugget In a bowl, add chicken, oil, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, asafoetida, black pepper powder, green chilies, coriander leaves, mayonnaise and mix it well. Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind it to a coarse mixture. Add potatoes, salt to taste and make lemon sized balls. Give it the desired shape and coat it with bread crumbs. Heat the oil, place nuggets and fry until golden in color. In a bowl, add nuggets, degi red chili powder and toss it well. Transfer it to a serving dish, serve hot with prepared dip and prepared salad. For Dip In a bowl, add mayonnaise, oregano, chili flakes, lemon juice, garlic, tomato ketchup and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Salad In a bowl, add tomato, onion, lemon juice, salt to taste, coriander, black peppercorns and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Bread Crumbs In a grinder jar, add bread slice, salt to taste, refined flour and grind it into coarse crumbs. Keep it aside for further use. For Burger In a pan, add butter, once it's melted, add green chilies, coriander leaves, chicken nuggets and toss it well. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside. In the same pan, toss the ladi pav from both sides. Take the tossed ladi pav, add prepared salad, mint chutney, tossed nuggets, prepared dip and grated cheese. Serve hot with mint chutney. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickennuggets #chickenpopcorn #ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe #chickenpakoda #chickenpopcornrecipe #chickenlollipop #chickenburger

Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस 1 cup Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप 1 ¼ cup Water, पानी 1 tsp Vinegar, चीनी For Dungar Coal, कोयला 1-2 tsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Chicken Marination 300 gms Chicken breast, चिकन 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार 1 tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ 1 no. Green chili (less Spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 tsp Oil 2-3 tsp Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Cheese Mixture few Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल 2-3 no. Green chilies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 3-4 no. Garlic cloves, finely chopped, लहसुन ½ Capsicum, finely chopped, शिमला मिर्च 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed 1 block Processed cheese, grated 2-3 tbsp Pizza Cheese Blend 1 tsp Smoked Butter, melted 1 ½ tbsp Softened butter, cubed For Chicken Mixture Seared chicken, pulled, भुना हुआ चिकन 2-3 tbsp Prepared Sauce, तैयार सॉस For Chicken Cheese Chili Toast ½ tsp Butter, cubed 2-3 no. Bread slice Prepared Cheese Mixture, तैयार चीज मिश्रण Prepared chicken Chili Mixture, तैयार चिकन मिश्रण Prepared Cheese Mixture, तैयार चीज मिश्रण For Egg Mixture 3-4 Egg, boiled, chopped, उबले अंडे 2-3 tbsp prepared sauce, तैयार सॉस For Egg Cheese Chili Toast ¼ tsp Butter, cubed 2-3 no. Bread slice Prepared Cheese Mixture, तैयार चीज मिश्रण Prepared Egg Mixture, तैयार अंडे का मिश्रण Prepared Cheese Mixture, तैयार चीज मिश्रण For Garnish Coriander sprig Spring onions Egg, sliced Mayonnaise dip Process For Sauce In a saucepan or shallow pan, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic clove, ginger and saute it for a minute. Add onions and cook until translucent on high flame, add coriander stems, black peppercorns, cloves, degi red chili powder and saute it well on medium flame. Add sugar, salt to taste, light soy sauce, tomato ketchup, water, vinegar and cook for a few minutes on moderate heat. Place the steel bowl with coal in the sauce, add butter and cover it with the lid. Keep it aside for further use. For Dungar Place the coal on a gas flame and burn the coal well. Place it in a small steel bowl and keep aside for further use. For Chicken Marination In a bowl, add chicken, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, mayonnaise, green chili, lemon juice, oil and marinate it well. Keep it aside. For Seared Chicken In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and cook it from both the sides. Place the coal, add butter and cover it with a lid. Transfer the chicken to a plate and shred the chicken with the help of a knife or a fork. Keep it aside for further use. For Cheese Mixture In a bowl, add tender coriander stems, green chillies, coriander leaves, garlic, capsicum, crushed black peppercorns, grated processed cheese, pizza cheese blend, smoked butter, softened butter and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Mixture In a bowl, add seared chicken, prepared sauce and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Cheese Chili Toast In a pan, add butter, once it melts, place bread slices and toast it on one side. Place the prepared cheese mixture, prepared chicken mixture on the toasted side and spread it well. Add the butter to the pan, place toast and cook it well. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with spring onion, cucumber and coriander sprig. Serve hot with mayonnaise dip. For Egg Mixture In a bowl, add egg, prepared sauce and mix it well together. Keep it aside for further use. For Egg Cheese Chili Toast In a pan, melt some butter, place bread slices and toast on one side. Spread the prepared cheese mixture & prepared egg mixture on the toasted side. Add the butter to the pan, place toast and cook it well. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with spring onion, cucumber, egg slices, degi red chili powder and coriander sprig. Serve hot with mayonnaise dip. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickensandwich #cheesechillitoast #ranveerbrar

well. Add water, salt to taste, oil and make a smooth batter. Keep it aside for further use. For Onion Chili Cheela On a heated tawa, pour the batter into small batches. Add onions, chili flakes, spring onion, drizzle some oil and cook it on both the sides on moderate heat. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander leaves. Serve hot. For Cheese Cheela On a heated tawa, pour prepared batter, drizzle some oil, add cheese, tomato, coriander leaves, tomato ketchup and cook it for a minute. Fold it from the middle and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with tomato wedges and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Threaded Cheela On a heated tawa, pour prepared mixture like thick thread or net, add chili flakes, coriander leaves and cook it on both the sides. Fold it from the middle like roti or chapati. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with mayonnaise, tomato ketchup and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Cheela Sandwich On a heated tawa, pour the prepared batter into small batches like pancakes, drizzle some oil, add tomato, salt to taste, coriander leaves and cook it on both the sides. Add green chutney, cheese and place another cheela on top like a sandwich. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with cheese, spring onion and tomato ketchup. Serve hot. For Jini Dosa Style Cheela On a heated tawa, pour the prepared batter and make a dosa, drizzle some ghee, add spring onion, tomato, onion, coriander leaves, paneer, cheese, chili flakes, mayonnaise, tomato ketchup green chutney and cook it for a minute. Roll it and cut into four equal parts. Garnish it with mayonnaise, cheese and coriander sprig. Serve hot. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #cheelarecipe #besanchila #ranveerbrar #chillarecipe #jinidosa #pancake #dosa #stuffedchilla #cheesecheela

title: Sweet Potato chaat | शकरकंद नदरू चाट | kashmiri lotus root Chat / healthy Lotus stem ॥ Chef Ranveer
description: SHAKARKANDI KI CHAAT - Seasonal change is the perfect time to eat healthy. What better than a healthy chaat!! *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒 🛍️RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
ingredients: 4 medium Sweet potato, शकरकंद | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी​​ | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 Dry red chili, broken into half, सूखी लाल मिर्च | A pinch of cumin seeds, जीरा | A pinch of fennel seeds, सौंफ | A pinch of onion seeds, कलौंजी | 2 Cloves, लौंग | 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक | 6-7 Green tomatoes, cut into diced, हरा टमाटर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ⅔ cup Jaggery, roughly chopped, गुड़ | Water as required, पानी | 1 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका | 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 3-4 medium Lotus roots, thinly sliced, कमल ककड़ी | ½ tbsp Prepared Chaat Masala, तैयार किया हुआ चाट मसाला | 1 heaped tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ | 1 ½ tsp Coriander seeds, धनिया की बीज | 2 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | 1 Clove, लौंग | ½ tsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | 4-5 no. Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना | A pinch of onion seeds, कलौंजी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tsp Dry mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर | 1 cup Fox nut, मखाना | Prepared Chaat Masala, तैयार किया हुआ चाट मसाला | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tsp Ghee for shallow fry, घी | Prepared Chutney, तैयार किया हुआ हरे टमाटर की चटनी
instructions: For Boiling Sweet Potato | In a sauce pot, add sweet potato, salt to taste, sugar, water and boil it for 5-7 minutes or until cooked. | Peel it and keep it aside for further use. | For Hare Tamatar ki Chutney | In a kadai, add ghee, once it melts, add dry red chillies, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, onion seeds, cloves and let it splutter well. | Add ginger, green tomatoes, salt to taste, jaggery, water as required,cover it with the lid and cook it for 4-5 minutes or until cooked. | Add vinegar, degi red chili powder and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Chaat Masala | In a pan, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, coriander seeds, green cardamom, cloves, black peppercorns, fenugreek seeds, onion seeds, salt to taste and dry roast them for a minute. | Add degi red chili powder, dry mango powder and mix it well. | Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind it in a smooth powder. | Keep it aside for further use. | In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add fox nut and fry until crispy. | Transfer it to a bowl, add prepared chaat masala, salt to taste and mix well. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Shallow Frying Sweet Potato | In a kadai, add ghee, once its melt, add sweet potato and fry well. | Keep aside for further use. | For Lotus Root chips | Sliced the lotus root and keep in a bowl. | In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add lotus root and fry until crispy. | Transfer it to a bowl, add prepared chaat masala and mix well. | Keep it aside for further use. | In a serving plate, add curd, prepared chutney, fried sweet potato, lotus root chips, fried fox nut, sprinkle some chaat masala, pomegranate pearl, coriander sprig and serve. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना A pinch of onion seeds, कलौंजी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Dry mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर For Fox Nut 1 cup Fox nut, मखाना Prepared Chaat Masala, तैयार किया हुआ चाट मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए 2 tsp Ghee for shallow fry, घी For Garnish Curd, beaten, दही Prepared Chutney, तैयार किया हुआ हरे टमाटर की चटनी Pomegranate pearl, अनारदाना Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Boiling Sweet Potato In a sauce pot, add sweet potato, salt to taste, sugar, water and boil it for 5-7 minutes or until cooked. Peel it and keep it aside for further use. For Hare Tamatar ki Chutney In a kadai, add ghee, once it melts, add dry red chillies, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, onion seeds, cloves and let it splutter well. Add ginger, green tomatoes, salt to taste, jaggery, water as required,cover it with the lid and cook it for 4-5 minutes or until cooked. Add vinegar, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Chaat Masala In a pan, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, coriander seeds, green cardamom, cloves, black peppercorns, fenugreek seeds, onion seeds, salt to taste and dry roast them for a minute. Add degi red chili powder, dry mango powder and mix it well. Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind it in a smooth powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Fox Nut In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add fox nut and fry until crispy. Transfer it to a bowl, add prepared chaat masala, salt to taste and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. For Shallow Frying Sweet Potato In a kadai, add ghee, once its melt, add sweet potato and fry well. Keep aside for further use. For Lotus Root chips Sliced the lotus root and keep in a bowl. In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add lotus root and fry until crispy. Transfer it to a bowl, add prepared chaat masala and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. For Garnish In a serving plate, add curd, prepared chutney, fried sweet potato, lotus root chips, fried fox nut, sprinkle some chaat masala, pomegranate pearl, coriander sprig and serve. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #shakarkandichaat #vratrecipes #ranveerbrar #crispylotusstem #nadru #bhein #vratkichaat #शकरकंदकीचाट

raw_text: VEG SHAMI KEBAB - Yes, it's possible with Tempayy. Taste and texture both guaranteed! And yehi nahin..there's a bonus high protein sandwich idea too! So whether you are hosting, making snacks for your kids or getting weekend ready - these Tempayy Shami Kebabs are perfect. Tempeh kya hai? A vegetarian protein rich food made by fermenting soybeans and cut into easy to cook cubes. Super Simple. 38 gm protein, badiya swaad and not processed - the best. Trust me, try it. Phir mat bolna, Ranveer aapne toh bataya hi nahi Check out their Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hello_tempayy/ More Tempeh recipes: https://www.youtube.com/@HelloTempayy #collab #Shamikabab #tempayychilli #keema *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒 🛍️RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Seekh Kebab - https://youtu.be/_6ZnbxlErUo Railway cutlet - https://youtu.be/kaBo82iYW68 Chicken Cutlet - https://youtu.be/mUzk3NMNaUM *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** VEG SHAMI KEBAB WITH TEMPAYY Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Shami Kebab 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 3 medium Carrots (peeled & grated) गाजर 8-10 no. French beans, finely chopped, फ्रेंच बींस Marinated Tempayy cubes, मैरिनेटेड टेम्पे क्यूब्स ½ tbsp Oil, तेल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Water, पानी 1 ½ tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Marination 200 gms Natural Tempayy cubes, टेम्पे क्यूब्स 1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर For Masala 5 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 4-5 Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 tsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज ½ inch Mace, जावित्री Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Filling 2 no. Green chillies, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Tender coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक ⅓ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही Other Ingredients 4-5 Bread slice, ब्रेड 2 tsp Oil for shallow frying, तेल 1 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Garnish Prepared Filling, तैयार की हुई फीलिंग Mint chutney, पुदीने की चटनी Onion rings, प्याज Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Tempayy Kebab In a lagan or kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, green chili and let it saute for a few seconds on moderate heat. Add carrots, french beans and saute it well. Add marinated natural tempayy and mix it well. Add oil, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 minutes on moderate heat. Add water, cover it with the lid and cook it for a while until cooked well. Mash the mixture with the help of masher or wooden spatula. Add prepared masala and mix it well. Transfer the mixture into a tray and keep it aside to cool down to room temperature. Make lemon size balls and stuff the filling. Give it the desired shapes. In a pan, add oil,, once it's hot, place the prepared kebabs and shallow fry until golden brown on both sides. Transfer it onto a serving dish. Garnish it with green chutney, prepared filling, coriander sprig, mint sprig and sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder. Serve hot. For Masala In a shallow pan, add black cardamom, cloves, black peppercorns, coriander seeds, mace, salt to taste and dry roast it for a minute. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind into a coarse powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Tempayy Marination In a bowl, add natural tempayy, lemon juice, curd, ginger garlic paste, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder and mix it well. Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes for marinating. For Filling In a bowl, add green chili, tender coriander stems, ginger, hung curd and mix everything very well. Keep it aside for further use. For Kebab Sandwich Take the bread slices, add the prepared filling and spread it well. Place another bread slice and make a sandwich. Apply butter in the toaster, place sandwiches and toast it well. Cut it into half and place it in a serving dish, garnish it with green chutney, hung curd, onions rings, coriander sprig. Serve hot. ************************* 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Kebab #tempeh #vegprotein #vegan #protein #hellotempayy

Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 1 tbsp Ginger Green chili paste, अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट 3 medium Potatoes (peeled & cubed) आलू 1 medium Cauliflower (cut in florets) फूलगोभी 2-3 tbsp Prepared Masala Mixture, मसाले का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of sugar, चीनी Little water, पानी 1 medium Tomato, cut into dice, टमाटर For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता For Shadi Wala Aloo Gobi 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 Cloves, लौंग 1 heaped tbsp Ginger Green chili paste, अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 3-4 tbsp Prepared Masala Mixture, मसाले का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी Little water, पानी Fried Potatoes, तले हुए आलू Fried Cauliflower, florets, तले हुए फूलगोभी For Garnish 1 Green chili, slit into half, हरी मिर्च Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता ½ inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक Other Ingredients 2 tsp Ghee (for Layering) घी Whole wheat flour, for dusting, गेहूं का आटा 2 tsp Ghee (for roasting) घी For Paratha Dough 2 cups Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Ghee, घी ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन Water, पानी 1 tsp Oil (after kneading) तेल Process For Ginger Chili Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chili, salt to taste and make it coarsely paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Washing Veggies In a bowl, add cauliflower, water, salt to taste and mix it well. Keep it aside for 20-30 minutes. In a bowl, add potato, water and keep it aside for further use. For Frying In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add cauliflower and fry until golden in color. Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. Add potato and fry until 80% cooked. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Masala Mixture In a bowl, add coriander powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, asafoetida, water, curd, tender coriander stems and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Ghar Wala Aloo Gobi In a kadai or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds and let it splutter well. Add ginger chili paste and saute it for a minute on moderate heat. Add potatoes and saute well, add cauliflower, prepared masala mixture and mix everything very well. Add salt to taste, sugar, water and saute it well. Now, cover it with the lid and keep it aside for further cooking. Add tomatoes and turn off the flame. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with paratha. For Shaadi Wale Aloo Gobi In a kadai or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, green cardamom, cloves and let it splutter. Add ginger chili paste and saute it for a minute on high flame. Add prepared masala mixture and saute well on high flame. Add salt to taste, tomato puree and cover it with the lid and cook it for 3-4 minutes on low flame. Add water, fried potatoes, fried cauliflower and cook it well on moderate heat. Transfer it to a on the serving dish, garnish it with ginger julienned, green chili, and coriander sprig. Serve hot with paratha. For Paratha Dough In a parat, add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, ghee, carom seeds, water and knead it well. Make it medium soft dough and keep it aside. Apply oil on the dough and keep it aside for resting. Divide the dough into equal lemon size balls, roll it into rotis, apply ghee and fold it like a book or shape it into a triangle. For Cooking Paratha In a tawa add ghee, once it's hot, place paratha and cook it from both the sides. Transfer it to a plate and keep it aside for further use. #aloogobisabji #aloogobhi #ranveerbrar #aloogobimasala #shadiwalaaloogobi #mixedveg

For Egg Fried Rice In a wok or deep pan, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic, ginger and saute it on high flame for a few seconds. Add carrot, cabbage, salt to taste, sugar and saute on high flame. Add green chillies, vinegar and mix it well. Add eggs and mix it together. Add french beans, cooked rice and mix everything very well. Add light soy sauce, white pepper powder and stir it well. Add spring onion, white sesame seeds and toss well. Keep it aside for further use. For Sauce Mixture In a bowl, add vinegar, light soy sauce, tomato ketchup, green chili sauce, water, sugar and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Sauce In a wok or deep pan, add oil, once it's hot, add green chili, capsicum, onion, ginger and saute it for a minute on high flame. Add prepared sauce mixture and stir it well. Turn off the flame and keep it aside for further use. For Omelette In a bowl, add eggs, water, salt to taste, coriander leaves, oil and whisk it well. In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, pour the mixture and make a thin omelet. Transfer it to a plate and keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a bowl, place the prepared omelette, add egg fried rice and close it from all sides. Transfer it to a serving plate, cut through the middle and pour the sauce on it. In a bowl, place prepared omelette, add prepared sauce and close it from all sides. Add the fried rice onto the serving dish and place the gravy pocket on it. Cut through it and let the sauce flow. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 3 medium Onion, cut into dice, प्याज 1 ½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 medium Tomato, roughly chopped, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Little water, पानी For Frying Potatoes 6-7 Potatoes, peeled & cubed, आलू Oil for frying, तेल For Aloo Do Pyaza 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 1 tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Fried Potatoes, तले हुए आलू ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2-3 tbsp Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी 1 medium Onion, cubed, प्याज 1 medium Capsicum, cubed, शिमला मिर्च 1 large Tomato, cubed, टमाटर 1 tbsp Coriander leaves with stem, chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ cup Spring onion, roughly chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता 2-3 tbsp Prepared Gravy, तैयार किया हुआ ग्रेवी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Sugar (optional) चीनी For Garnish few Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Gravy In a sauce pot or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, black cardamom, cloves, green cardamom and let it splutter. Add onions and saute it for 2-3 minutes or until translucent on high flame. Add ginger garlic paste and saute for a minute. Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and mix it well. Add tomato, salt to taste, water, cover it with a lid and cook it for 4-5 minutes on moderate heat. Transfer it to the mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Frying In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add potato and fry until golden in color.. Transfer it in a bowl or tray and keep it aside for further use. For Aloo Do Pyaza In a shallow pan, add butter, once it’s melted, add dry fenugreek leaves, fried potatoes and toss it well. Add degi red chili powder, prepared gravy and saute it well. Add onion and toss it for a few seconds on high flame, add capsicum, tomato and give it a good mix. Add coriander leaves with stem, spring onion and prepared gravy. Finish it with salt to taste, sugar and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with spring onion, coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or paratha. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Aloodopyaza #alookisabjirecipe #ranveerbrar #aloodopyaaza #aloosabzi #aloorecipe #aloosabjibananekividhi

Paste 2 tbsp Melon seeds, soaked, मगज 15-18 Almonds, soaked & peeled, बादाम 15-18 Cashew Nuts, soaked, काजू 2 tsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने Few Saffron strands, केसर 2 tbsp Fennel seeds, soaked, सौंफ 2 tbsp Poppy seeds, soaked, खसखस 8-10 Pistachios (soaked & peeled) पिस्ता Ghee for frying, घी For Garnish Prepared Rabdi, तैयार की हुई रबड़ी Almonds, sliver, बादाम Pistachios, sliver, पिस्ता Rose petals, गुलाब की पंखुड़ियाँ fresh Mint sprig, पुदीने के पत्ते Silver vark, चांदी का वर्क Process For Mawa Batter In a bowl, add refined flour, semolina, curd, mawa, salt to taste, water and make a smooth batter. Add crushed black peppercorns, fennel seeds, saffron water, baking soda, oil and mix everything well. Keep it aside for 25-30 minutes for resting. For Condensed Milk Batter In a bowl, add refined flour, semolina, curd, condensed milk, salt to taste, water and make a smooth batter. Add crushed black peppercorns, fennel seeds, saffron water, baking soda, oil and mix everything well. Keep it aside for 25-30 minutes for resting. For Milk Powder Batter In a bowl, add refined flour, semolina, curd, milk powder, salt to taste, water and make a smooth batter. Add crushed black peppercorns, fennel seeds, saffron water, baking soda, oil and mix everything well. Keep it aside for 25-30 minutes for resting. For Sugar Syrup In a small sauce pot, add sugar, water and cook on moderate heat. Once sugar syrup is in one string consistency, turn off the flame and keep it aside for further use. For Rabdi In a kadai or sauce pot, add milk, mawa and give a quick boil. Add saffron water, sugar and stir it well. Add prepared thandai paste and cook it until it thickens. Transfer it in a bowl and garnish it with saffron strands. Keep it in the fridge to chill. For Thandai Paste In a grinder jar, add soaked melon seeds, almonds, cashew nuts, black peppercorns, saffron strands, fennel seeds, poppy seeds, pistachio and grind it in a coarse paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Malpua In a flat pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add batter and fry it until golden in color. Dip it in the sugar syrup and let it soak for a few minutes. Transfer it to a serving dish and serve it with chilled rabdi. Garnish it with almond slivers, pistachio slivers, rose petals, mint sprig and silver vark. Serve chill. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Malpua #holispecial #ranveerbrar #malpuabananekividhi #malpuarecipeinhindi #malpuareciperanveerbrar #malpuakaisebanatehain #malpuarabri #easymalpuarecipe

Eggs, अंडे 3-4 no. Green chillies (spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, grated, अदरक Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ cup Processed cheese, grated, चीज ½ tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Oil, for frying, तेल For Ginger Garlic paste 3-4 no. For Coating In a large bowl, add prepared omelet cubes, ginger garlic paste, curd, gram flour, cornstarch, rice flour, refined flour, a pinch of asafoetida, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and coat everything well. Re-fry the egg cubes in smoky hot oil until it’s golden in color and is crispy in texture. Transfer it to a plate and keep it aside for further use. For Tempering In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add curry leaves, dry kashmiri red chillies, ginger garlic paste and saute it well. Add degi red chili powder, fried egg cubes, curry leaves, tender coriander stem, crushed black peppercorns, salt to taste, sugar, lemon juice and toss it well.
